About

JUST
KYU.

I'm Kyu — 17, from Texas, figuring it out. I work at AT&T as a Corporate Assistant Accounts Manager, make content, ride motorcycles, game on PC, and spend too much time on my cars — a Saturn Ion and a Mercedes-Benz C240.

Built Scentborne from the ground up — a curated fragrance shop with genuine, premium scents at real prices. Took over CEO at 16. Sold in 2026.

FRAGRANCE
DONE RIGHT.

Scentborne is my fragrance brand — a curated shop of genuine, premium fragrances at honest prices. Every bottle ships free over $120, US-wide.

Real brands. No knockoffs. No markup games.

THE
BENZ.

2002 Mercedes-Benz C240 W203 — a long-term build I've been working through. I've tackled the SRS system, instrument cluster, suspension, and electrical. The end goal is an LS swap. Forums, documentation, and trial and error.
